summary: Execution board refreshed, but no truthful do-now lane was available; the board itself is the structural truth source.

structural_capability.name: execution_board_follow_through_runner
structural_capability.why_new: Creates a dedicated runtime that turns the execution board into the next actionable lane instead of letting system-design repairs stop at packet refreshes or queue housekeeping.

fake_green_guard: This runner only counts if it refreshes the consolidated execution board and either advances one of its executable lanes or explicitly records that no truthful do-now lane exists yet.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is the primary success gate
outreach-log.md: avoid duplicate submission work and repeated HN/Lobsters-only handoff
market_intelligence_latest.json: reusable competitor comparisons and positioning truths
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: consolidated do-now assets across all non-Reddit lanes
